1 Introducing SystemAI

We've vanquished thousands of
hours of useless admin work.

System AI is a consultancy focused on AI‑powered workflows for ops‑heavy SMBs. From real estate to banking, we help teams remove manual steps between the tools they already rely on: WhatsApp, email, CRMs, sheets, and internal systems.

2 Case studies

Some of our work.

The Srama Group

WhatsApp-to-CRM automation, cut admin work by 97%.
Kestrl

Brand-matched Sharia stock screener, built in 7 days.
3 About

AI‑native since 2024.

Amr Hasanin
Founder

Founded by Amr Hasanin, a student at Queen Mary's University of London, System AI has shipped automations and other software solutions across multiple continents and industries.

Our work has helped clients win industry awards, get super fast empirical feedback for their go-to-market strategy, and operate like a much larger team without the added overhead.

4 Services

What we specialise in.

Message‑to‑system workflows

Automations that turn WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, and email conversations into structured records in CRMs, databases, and trackers with confirmations and audit logs.

AI email desks

AI‑assisted inboxes for support, sales, and operations that triage, draft replies, and log outcomes into your systems, while keeping humans in control of approvals.

Back‑office and approvals

Workflows that handle repetitive checks, routing, and approvals for things like onboarding, KYC, payments, and internal requests.

Analytics and reporting automations

Pipelines that pull data from your tools, prepare reports, and send alerts so leaders see what is happening without chasing spreadsheets.

Custom software and client-facing platforms

Custom software for what off-the-shelf tools cannot handle. From internal systems and client portals to web apps and websites. We build the product, logic, and integrations for your workflows.

AI agents for real work

AI that researches, decides, and executes multi-step tasks across your tools. From lead qualification and document handling to triage and follow-up, we build agents with guardrails and approvals built in.

5 How we work

From first call to launch.

1

Funnel Map Audit

A free 30‑minute session where we audit your funnel, identify bottlenecks, and map out exactly where AI can move the needle.

2

Proposal

We deliver a clear scope, timeline, and fixed price. No surprises, no hourly billing. You know exactly what you're getting.

3

Project

Our team builds, tests, and deploys your systems. You get weekly updates and a working product – not a deck full of promises.

4

Ongoing Management

Optional retainer for monitoring, optimization, and iteration. Most clients see compounding returns over time.

6 Testimonials

Some words from happy clients.

"This centralised AI agent is saving each of our 12 team members an hour a day. We submitted this tool to REIQ and won Queensland Buyer's Agency of the Year."

Eden Appo Operations Manager, The Srama Group

"Masha'Allah killed it today bros - looking forward to the next phase of this"

Areeb Siddiqui Founder, Kestrl
